purpose: Saudi National Day (September 23, 94th) themed product showcase in Saudi green and gold palette with patriotic visual language.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Saudi National Day product display photography, {featured_product} styled with Saudi national identity colors — Saudi green (#006C35) and warm gold accents, Saudi palm tree or crossed swords motif subtly incorporated in background or surface decoration, dates and traditional elements as supporting props, bold confident lighting with directional key light on product, clean neutral or deep green surface, small Saudi flag element in composition without dominating, hyper-realistic product and material detail, shot on 50mm at f/5.6, no text overlay, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: flag used incorrectly or disrespectfully
Avoid in output: non-Saudi national symbols mixed in
notes: Intents: all. Saudi adaptation guidance: Saudi National Day September 23. Saudi green must be dominant. The Saudi flag contains the Shahada (Islamic declaration of faith) — must never be distorted, cut off, or used as background texture. Palm-and-swords emblem preferred over flag in AI-generated contexts. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 2-3 posts on National Day week. Compliance level: standard.
